      have : (Finset.Icc 1 1023) = Finset.disjointUnion (Finset.range 10) (λ i => Finset.Icc (2^i) (2^(i+1)-1)) sorry := sorry
      sorry
    have card_large : (Finset.filter (fun n => Odd n ∧ (Nat.bits 2 n) = (Nat.bits 2 n).reverse) (Finset.Icc 1024 1988)).card = 30 := sorry
    omega
  rw [Finset.filter_congr hf_pal, this]

let g (n : ℕ) : ℕ := (Nat.digits 2 n).foldl (fun a b => 2 * a + b) 0
  have hfg : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 1988, f n = g n := by
    intro n hn; induction n using Nat.strongInductionOn with | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => simp at hn; linarith
    | 1 => exact h₁
    | 2 => rw [h₃ 1 (by norm_num), h₁, ih 1 (by simp)]; rfl
    | 3 => exact h₂
    | n + 4 =>
      let m := n + 4
      have hm : m > 0 := by linarith
      if he : m % 2 = 0 then
        obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_mul_left_of_dvd (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero he)
        rw [hk, h₃ k (by linarith), ih k (by linarith)]; (dsimp [g]; sorry)
      else if ho : m % 4 = 1 then
        let k := (m - 1) / 4
        have : m = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [Nat.div_add_mod m 4, ho]
        rw [this, h₄ k (by linarith), ih (2 * k + 1) (by linarith), ih k (by linarith)]; (dsimp [g]; sorry)
      else
        have ho3 : m % 4 = 3 := by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m (by norm_num : 0 < 4), he, ho]
        let k := (m - 3) / 4
        have : m = 4 * k + 3 := by linarith [Nat.div_add_mod m 4, ho3]
        rw [this, h₅ k (by linarith), ih (2 * k + 1) (by linarith), ih k (by linarith)]; (dsimp [g]; sorry)
  have hgn : (Finset.Icc 1 1988).filter (fun n => g n = n).card = 92 := by native_decide
  rw [← hgn]; apply Finset.card_congr (λ n _ => n) <;> simp [hfg]
